evidence.nullSemantics: null prices and missing defaultPriceRecordId are unavailable/review states, not zero prices

constraints: exit after reviewed clean shadow report
approvals.name: Shadow Mode Approval
Feature Flag Approval
approvals.scope: pricing data source and adapter only

approvals.mechanism: single feature flag or single commit rollback to current Website data/model-pricing.json path
approvals.name: Rollback Approval
requirements: keep legacy data/model-pricing.json until parity and production confidence are proven
do not migrate all consumers in one commit
adapter must preserve old shape while flag is off
projection artifact changes must be reviewable in git
Supabase sync must remain separate from Website runtime migration

approvals.decision: single canonical identity with effective-date PriceRecords; no independent intro model identity
approvals.name: Claude Sonnet 5 Approval

approvals.decision: retired redirected identity retained; redirectTarget and billingModel are explicit; replacementModel remains evidence-gated
approvals.name: Grok 3 Approval

approvals.decision: review_required, defaultSafe=false, display-only or temporary legacy paths only
approvals.name: GPT-4.1 Family Approval

approvals.decision: separate later-stage projection; no irreversible dependency in Phase 4 initial implementation
approvals.name: Supabase Approval

sequence.goal: clean existing Website data/model-pricing.json change before implementation
sequence.name: Website P0 Hotfix separate commit

sequence.goal: commit repo-local Website-compatible projection without changing consumers
sequence.name: Add generated projection artifact

sequence.goal: support old and projected shapes with default off
sequence.name: Add adapter behind feature flag

sequence.goal: compare current Website pricing to canonical projection without changing user results
sequence.name: Shadow parity

sequence.goal: migrate PricingTable or homepage highlights first
sequence.name: Low-risk consumer pilot

sequence.goal: enforce defaultSafe for API Cost Calculator and homepage estimator
sequence.name: Calculator migration

sequence.goal: migrate route presets and cache blending with safe defaults only
sequence.name: Budget Planner migration

sequence.goal: migrate display pages while preserving editorial metadata
sequence.name: SEO / Comparison migration

sequence.goal: generate seed/sync artifact from Canonical V2
sequence.name: Supabase projection

sequence.goal: remove manual dual maintenance only after shadow parity and rollback are proven
sequence.name: Legacy dataset retirement

gateName: Phase 3.5 Website Integration Planning Approval Gate

temporaryMappingReview.exitCondition: Replace temporary legacy display with explicit review_required display mode after official pricing provenance is completed or the model is deliberately removed from calculation selectors.
temporaryMappingReview.reason: GPT-4.1 family remains review_required with no default-safe selected PriceRecord.
temporaryMappingReview.risk: medium: accidental calculator default exposure if defaultSafe is not enforced in both projection and Website adapter.
